title: The Rosary
content:
One asked me where the roses grew:
I bade him not go seek,
But forwith bade my Julia show
A bud in either cheek.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "The Rosary"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
